SpTU 5, 309 [loan of dates][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (missing)
Reverse
r 1r 1

ina ḫa-ṣa-ri ina-an-din-ʾ e-lat 1en gišGIŠIMMAR

(r 1) in the dates' delivery place, apart from one special date palm of Adad, who are interdependent for the payment. Iqiša will be paid where he wants. Those arable lands, Rihat-Anu, son of Anu-ahhe-[...] ... PN, son of Anu-mukin-apli and [PN ...], his brother ... [... Anu]-belšunu, son of Šamaš-[...].

r 22

ia-a-ḫu-du ša₂ dIŠKUR ša₂ ina IGI-šu₂-nu pu-ut

r 33

a-ḫa-miš a-na SUR na-šu-u₂ a-šar ša₂ mBAša₂-a

r 44

ṣe-bu-u₂ in-ne₂SUR ŠE.NUMUN MU-MEŠ mri-ḫat—d60

r 55

DUMU ša₂ md60—ŠEŠ—⸢MEŠ?⸣-[...] x x DUMU ša₂ md60—DU—A

r 66

u md[x]-x [...] x [...] ⸢ḪI?⸣ x x ⸢ŠEŠ?-šu₂⸣ u ⸢LU⸣ x ša₂ ⸢BU⸣ x x
